context: Kelly Electric LLC reimburses out-of-pocket purchases made for jobs by Brandon and apprentice Darren Yates. Any single purchase over $200 needs Brandon's approval before it is bought.

validation_rules.notes: Covers wire, breakers, fittings, conduit and small consumables bought at Cedarbrook Supply or the local supply house.
validation_rules.requirement: Itemized receipt with job address noted

validation_rules.notes: Brandon confirms the bid covers it before the part is bought.
validation_rules.requirement: Photo of receipt plus quote reference
validation_rules.rule: Any single purchase of $200 or more

validation_rules.action: Reimburse at IRS standard mileage rate
validation_rules.notes: Truck fuel for the F-150 logged against the job, not commuting.
validation_rules.requirement: Mileage log or fuel receipt tied to a job
validation_rules.rule: Fuel and mileage to job sites
